category_sources: Official Wasmer docs describe an ecosystem based on WebAssembly for running applications in browsers, embedded contexts, or servers.
source_facts.description says Wasmer is a universal WebAssembly runtime.
display_name_sources: Official documentation is titled Wasmer Docs.
docs_sources: Official documentation is hosted on the dedicated docs.wasmer.io domain.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/wasmerio/wasmer; per instruction, repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: Official docs mention runtime, registry, edge, and SDKs for multiple languages and operating systems.
